module.description: Reserved EV spot, gate code, and charger PIN for the guest booklet
host.section.spot.help: The spot label stays visible; the gate code and charger PIN follow the reveal schedule.
host.section.directions.help: Optional — map link and tips to find the spot.
host.spotLabel.label: Reserved spot
host.parkingCode.label: Parking gate code
host.parkingCode.placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current code
host.chargerPin.label: Charger PIN
host.chargerPin.placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current PIN
host.mapUrl.label: Map link (optional)
host.instructions.label: Instructions (optional)
host.instructions.placeholder: e.g. Use the left-hand entrance after the barrier
host.section.reveal: When to show codes and PIN
host.section.reveal.help: The spot label stays visible; the gate code and charger PIN follow this schedule.
host.reveal.always.desc: Codes visible as soon as the booklet opens.
host.reveal.dayBefore16h.desc: Visible the day before at 4 pm, property time.
host.reveal.atCheckin.desc: Visible only from the arrival time.
host.main.help: Spot label, codes, and map link are stored for this module only.
guest.empty.title: EV parking not configured
guest.empty.description: Add parking details from the host dashboard
guest.error.title: EV parking temporarily unavailable
guest.error.description: Parking details could not be loaded
module.status.incomplete.title: Incomplete configuration
module.status.incomplete.description: Finish EV parking setup in the host dashboard
module.status.incomplete.hint: Spot, gate code, or charger PIN missing — open Modules → EV parking
module.status.inactive.title: EV parking module disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
reveal.locked.generic: Gate code and charger PIN will be available closer to check-in.
